name: Checks Cashed
description_short: Checks.com is an online personal check printing company offering affordable check designs, checkbook covers, and related accessories with fraud protection and same-day ordering options.
description_long:
Checks.com was founded in 2006 in Colorado Springs, Colorado, with a mission to provide high-quality personal checks at affordable prices. The company operates exclusively through online ordering to keep costs low and ensure safe, secure transactions for customers. Over 20 years later, they continue to expand their product offerings while maintaining their core commitment to quality, security, and value.

The company offers a comprehensive range of personal check products including traditional checks starting at $9.20 per box, value checks at $8.20, and premium choice checks at $10.20. Customers can choose from over 70 check designs spanning multiple categories: classic styles, Disney-branded checks, animal-themed designs, and scenic/inspirational prints. Beyond checks, Checks.com provides coordinating products such as checkbook covers, address labels, and deposit slips, all customizable with fonts, monograms, and custom messages through their online configurator.

Checks.com distinguishes itself through several key features: SentryShield Pro fraud protection included with purchases, guaranteed lowest prices with no discount codes required, fast shipping with upgrade options available, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee on all orders. They emphasize SSL-secure website technology and order verification with financial institutions to protect customer identity and check security. The company's exclusive online-only model eliminates retail overhead, allowing them to pass savings directly to customers.

While Checks.com fills a legitimate niche in check ordering and printing, customers should understand that this is primarily a check printing/production service, not a check cashing or financial services provider. The company does not provide lending, credit services, or actual check cashing functionality. For consumers who still use checks regularly, Checks.com offers genuine value through competitive pricing and design variety, though the declining use of physical checks means demand for this service continues to shrink.
pros: Prices start as low as $8.20 per box with no hidden discount codes required
Over 70 unique check designs including exclusive Disney, Thomas Kinkade, and artist collaborations
SentryShield Pro fraud protection included with every order at no additional cost
Fast shipping with upgrade options available for time-sensitive needs
Customization options including fonts, monograms, and custom messages via online configurator
Coordinating products available (checkbook covers, address labels, deposit slips)
cons: Exclusively online ordering only—no phone, in-person, or retail options for customers who prefer traditional service channels
Physical checks are a declining payment method, limiting the long-term relevance of this service for many consumers
Shipping delays mean checks are not available for immediate same-day needs unlike physical retail alternatives
No financial services offered (no check cashing, money orders, or wire transfers despite category placement)
Customization process requires navigating online configurator, which may be cumbersome for less tech-savvy users
best_for: Consumers who still regularly use checks and want affordable, attractive designs with security features
Small business owners ordering personal or business checks in bulk with customization needs
Individuals seeking check design variety and personalization beyond standard bank check offerings
Budget-conscious households looking for the lowest-cost check printing without quality compromise
diagnosis: Checks.com is best for budget-conscious consumers and small business owners who still actively use checks and want affordable, personalized designs with fraud protection. The key caveat is that this is purely a check printing service, not a financial service provider offering check cashing, lending, or other consumer finance products—it is miscategorized under check-cashing when it should be classified under business or print services.
services: Premium choice checks with Disney designs
